onboarding.title: YouTube Analytics
onboarding.subtitle: Pull channel stats, videos, and search results from public YouTube
onboarding.sampleDataDescription: No sample data — this template scrapes live YouTube data via the Apify API.

steps.title: Add your Apify Token
steps.description: Sign up at apify.com and paste your token from console.apify.com/account/integrations.

steps.title: Run an Operation
steps.description: Pull channel stats, recent videos, or search results from any public YouTube channel.

steps.title: Browse Results
steps.description: Every run is saved to history.

reference.overview: Wraps the streamers/youtube-scraper actor to pull public YouTube data. Read-only.

concepts.name: Channel
concepts.description: Public channel stats — subscribers, video count, total views.

concepts.name: Videos
concepts.description: Recent videos with view/like/comment counts and duration.

concepts.name: Search
concepts.description: Search YouTube and get back ranked video results.

prompts: How many subscribers does MrBeast have?
Show me the last 10 videos from @veritasium
Compare subscriber counts for MrBeast and PewDiePie
tips: Each Apify run costs you compute on apify.com — keep maxVideos small while testing.
Your APIFY_TOKEN unlocks the same actors across all four apify-* templates.
